prompt: {"type":"children's clothing reference sheet","style":"clean studio fashion documentation photo","subject":{"person":"young girl","age_appearance":"approximately 5 to 7 years old","face":"anonymized with a soft rectangular blur covering the face in the front and side views","hair":{"color":"light brown to dark blonde","style":"long loose wavy hair with a center part, slightly curlier toward the ends"},"pose_set":"standing naturally with arms relaxed"},"outfit":{"top":{"type":"sweatshirt","color":"bright pink-red","details":["crew neckline","long sleeves with cuffed wrists","small button placket at upper chest","horizontal decorative bands across lower chest and sleeves","tiny floral motifs within the bands"]},"bottom":{"type":"pants","color":"red and white","pattern":"small gingham check","fit":"slim jogger-style pajama or lounge pants with gathered ankles"},"footwear":"barefoot"},"layout":{"background":"plain light gray indoor wall with white baseboard and warm medium-tone wooden floor","sections":[{"title":"正面図","position":"left","count":1,"labels":["front view"]},{"title":"側面図","position":"center","count":1,"labels":["side view"]},{"title":"背面図","position":"right","count":1,"labels":["back view"]}],"figure_count":3,"composition":"three evenly spaced full-body photos arranged in vertical panels across a landscape canvas","view_details":{"left":"full frontal standing view","center":"left-facing side profile standing view","right":"full back standing view"}},"image_quality":{"lighting":"soft even studio lighting with minimal shadows","camera":"straight-on eye-level fashion catalog framing","render_intent":"accurate apparel and body-view documentation, similar to a garment fitting or model extraction reference image"}}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"儿童服装参考图","style":"简洁的摄影棚风格时尚文档照片","subject":{"person":"年轻女孩","age_appearance":"约 5 至 7 岁","face":"正面和侧面视图中面部均经过柔和的矩形模糊处理","hair":{"color":"浅棕色至深金色","style":"长款自然波浪卷发，中分，发梢略微卷曲"},"pose_set":"自然站立，双臂放松"},"outfit":{"top":{"type":"卫衣","color":"亮粉红色","details":["圆领","长袖，袖口收紧","上胸部有小纽扣门襟","下胸部和袖子上有横向装饰带","装饰带内有细小的花卉图案"]},"bottom":{"type":"裤子","color":"红白相间","pattern":"小方格纹","fit":"修身慢跑裤风格的睡裤或家居裤，裤脚收口"},"footwear":"赤脚"},"layout":{"background":"简洁的浅灰色室内墙面，配有白色踢脚线和暖色调中等深度的木地板","sections":[{"title":"正面图","position":"左","count":1,"labels":["正面视图"]},{"title":"侧面图","position":"中","count":1,"labels":["侧面视图"]},{"title":"背面图","position":"右","count":1,"labels":["背面视图"]}],"figure_count":3,"composition":"三张均匀分布的全身照，在横向画布上以垂直面板排列","view_details":{"left":"全身正面站立视图","center":"左侧面站立视图","right":"全身背面站立视图"}},"image_quality":{"lighting":"柔和均匀的摄影棚灯光，阴影极少","camera":"平视角度的时尚目录构图","render_intent":"准确的服装和身体视图文档，类似于服装试穿或模型提取参考图"}}

breakdown.creativeCore: 儿童服装三视图参考：一张简洁的摄影棚风格三视图参考图，展示了一名年轻女孩的正面、侧面和背面姿势，适用于服装文档、模型提取或转向式分析。
breakdown.subject: 人物
breakdown.bestUse: 游戏角色、IP 形象、Cosplay、职业角色设定

analysis.copyTemplate:
Create a 人物/角色 image for [用途/受众].

Main subject:
[主体]，[数量/状态/动作]，[关键外观/材质/身份]。

Scene:
[地点/环境]，[时间/天气/时代]，[背景元素]。

Composition:
[参考构图: full-body, vertical, horizontal]。

Visual style:
[参考风格: studio]。

Lighting and camera:
[参考光线镜头: studio lighting, camera]。

Text requirements:
包含标注/说明。

Quality constraints:
clean, coherent, polished, readable hierarchy, no random text, no visual clutter.
